sourcesContent:
import React from 'react';
import 'bootstrap/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css'
import Container from 'react-bootstrap/Container'
import Form from 'react-bootstrap/Form'

export const TicketForm = () => {
    return (
        <Container>
            <Form>
                <Form.Group controlId='form.Title'>
                    <Form.Label>Ticket Title</Form.Label>
                    <Form.Control type='text' placeholder="Please enter Ticket Title" />
                </Form.Group>
                <Form.Group controlId='form.Description'>
                    <Form.Label>Ticket Description</Form.Label>
                    <Form.Control type='text' placeholder='Please describe your ticket' />
                </Form.Group>
                <Form.Group controlId='form.severity'>
                    <Form.Label>Form Severity</Form.Label>
                    <Form.Control type = 'text' placeholder = 'Please select the severity of the ticket' />
                    <Form.Check name = 'Severity'  label = 'Low'/>
                    <Form.Check name = 'Severity'  label = 'Medium'/>
                    <Form.Check name = 'Severity'  label = 'High'/>
                    <Form.Check name = 'Severity'  label = 'Urgent'/>
                </Form.Group>
            </Form>
        </Container>
    )
}
